critic_raw:
Recsys evaluation — single pass:

Recall@50 is the right metric for a candidate generator component. The 17% lift is real. But using this metric to justify skipping an online holdback before a costly infrastructure migration misapplies the metric.

Three gaps:
1. Recall@50 does not measure watch time. The downstream ranker and guardrails determine what actually appears on the home page. Survival analysis absent.
2. No online experiment, no offline-online correlation analysis.
3. Downstream survival of additional candidates unknown.

Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: Baseline run 2. All three must-find issues. Verdict: critique_wins.
